decision: Use Filament v3 for admin panel
reasoning: Faster to build with consistent UI and built-in auth — no need to custom-build
expected_outcome: Rapid admin feature delivery without maintaining a custom panel

decision: Store settings as key/value rows in DB
reasoning: Allows admin to change values without a code deployment
expected_outcome: Non-technical admin can manage site content independently
Clear WhatsApp entry point without conflicting with other fixed UI elements

decision: Social icons hidden when URL is empty or #
reasoning: Prevents broken placeholder links appearing publicly
expected_outcome: Cleaner frontend — only real social profiles are shown
